items.definition_en: A place where children go to learn.
items.example_en: He goes to school every day.

items.definition_en: A place where students study after high school.
items.example_en: She will start college next year.

items.definition_en: An institution for higher education and research.
items.example_en: My brother studies at the university.

items.definition_en: A school or college for special training.
items.example_en: She joined a music academy.

items.definition_en: A school for young children before primary school.
items.example_en: My daughter loves her kindergarten.

items.definition_en: A school for very young children before school age.
items.example_en: Preschool starts at eight o'clock.

items.definition_en: A school where students live and study.
items.example_en: He goes to a boarding school far from home.

items.definition_en: A school for children between elementary and high school.
items.example_en: She is starting middle school this year.

items.definition_en: A school for students aged about 14 to 18.
items.example_en: Tom is in high school now.

items.definition_en: A school for children ages five to eleven.
items.example_en: He teaches at a primary school.

items.definition_en: A place for very young children while parents work.
items.example_en: She takes her son to nursery school.

items.definition_en: A school for learning special job skills.
items.example_en: He studies computers at a technical college.

items.definition_en: A school where students learn languages.
items.example_en: She attends a language school in summer.

items.definition_en: A school for people who study after work.
items.example_en: He studies mathematics at an evening school.

items.definition_en: A private school that teaches manners and culture.
items.example_en: She went to a finishing school in England.

items.definition_en: A school that is not run by the government.
items.example_en: Her parents pay for her private school.

items.definition_en: A school that is free and paid for by the government.
items.example_en: Most children go to public school.

items.definition_en: A school where students learn about art.
items.example_en: He applied to an art school last year.

items.definition_en: A school for grown people to learn new skills.
items.example_en: My father is studying English at an adult school.

items.definition_en: A school for children with special needs.
items.example_en: Anna attends a special school.
